dialog.save_data.save.could_not_save.message:
Could not save the file.
There is not enough free space on the memory card. To save your progress in the application, you must create at least {} of free space.

To create the free space, press PS button to pause this application, and then delete other applications or content.

message.load_app_failed.message:
Failed to load "{}".
Check vita3k.log to see console output for details.
1. Have you installed the firmware?
2. Re-dump your own PS Vita app/game and install it on Vita3K.
3. If you want to install or boot Vitamin, it is not supported.
